series_metadata.series_title: Request for Proposal for Independent Auditors
series_metadata.series_description: Final Request for Proposal issued supporting Ohio Turnpike Commission and Auditor of State schedules and correspondence. All materials received from responding firms and fee schedules of selected firms.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for present contract and two prior contracts ; Electronic: Retain for present contract and two prior contracts, Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
